subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! In this world there are many sects and factions, each with its own source and foundation, yet their principles remain confined and limited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت در جهان فرقه ها بسیار هر فرقه مبدای دارد ولکن مبادی شان محدود
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit
